title: Restore the original movie joystick scrub session behavior
summary: 0.6.53 backs out the broken 0.6.52 discrete-step replacement and restores the original CUA movie joystick scrub session path so trigger plus joystick and movie scrub semantics return to the last safe behavior.
changes: Restored the analog, session-based movie joystick scrub path in `FASyncRuntime.CuaPlayerInputModule`.
Restored the scrub-session pause, finalize-seek, and optional resume behavior that `0.6.52` removed.
Removed the `0.6.52` discrete skip-action replacement from the non-trigger movie joystick path.
reasoning: Live testing showed `0.6.52` changed the established joystick movie scrub model instead of fixing scrub magnitude inside that model.
The safest fix is to restore the exact `0.6.51` scrub-session behavior on a fresh version boundary before any narrower scrub-magnitude investigation continues.
operatorVisibleOutcomes: Movie joystick scrub returns to the original session-based behavior from the last safe rung.
Trigger plus joystick behavior is restored instead of being reinterpreted through discrete skip transport.
No slideshow, volume, gaze, or scene-builder work rides along with this slice.
knownIssues: This slice restores the last safe joystick movie scrub behavior but does not yet isolate the smaller scrub-magnitude seam reported before `0.6.52` drifted.
The parked Unity shell dirt remains intentionally outside this version.
